competitor_changes: anomaly detection powered by statistical models (GA)
data lineage tracking with full audit trail of data transformations
NexusCRM native connector (real-time, no rate limit issues)
email and Slack alert triggers on metric thresholds
current_tool_status: NexusCRM sync hits API rate limits above 50k records — dashboards stale by up to 4 hours
No self-serve embedded reporting for clients — requires export and manual PDF
ML-based anomaly detection promised on roadmap since Q2 2023, still not shipped
No mobile view — dashboards non-functional on phones/tablets
Data lineage tracking absent — compliance team flagging this for upcoming ISO audit
compliance_changes: MetricFlux has stronger compliance features including SOC 2 Type 2 and GDPR
notes: InsightDeck has larger data connector library (40+ native connectors vs 8 in MetricFlux)
MetricFlux has limited seats on Business tier (15 seats vs 12 in InsightDeck)
